description: This is a modern 'Pods View' dashboard for your Kubernetes cluster(s). Made for kube-prometheus-stack and take advantage of the latest Grafana features. GitHub repository: https://github.com/dotdc/grafana-dashboards-kubernetes

panels.description: Panel only works when a pod is selected.
panels.title: Created by

panels.description: Panel only works when a pod is selected.
panels.title: Running on

panels.description: Panel only works when a pod is selected.
panels.title: Pod IP

panels.description: Panel only works when a pod is selected.
panels.title: Priority Class

panels.description: Panel only works when a pod is selected.
panels.title: QOS Class

panels.description: Panel only works when a pod is selected.
panels.title: Last Terminated Reason

panels.description: Panel only works when a pod is selected.
panels.title: Last Terminated Exit Code

panels.description: If CPU requests are set: value is usage÷sum(requests) (1.0 ≈ 100% of request). If not: value is total pod CPU in cores (sum of rates).

targets.expr: sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", resource="cpu", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"})

panels.title: Total pod CPU Requests usage

panels.description: If CPU limits are set: value is usage÷sum(limits). If not: total pod CPU in cores.

targets.expr: sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", resource="cpu", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"})

panels.title: Total pod CPU Limits usage

panels.description: If memory requests are set: value is working_set÷sum(requests) (fraction). If not: working-set bytes (large number).

targets.expr: sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", resource="memory", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"})

panels.title: Total pod RAM Requests usage

panels.description: If memory limits are set: value is working_set÷sum(limits) (fraction). If not: working-set bytes.

targets.expr: sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", resource="memory", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"})

panels.title: Total pod RAM Limits usage

panels.description: Legend [pct]: usage ÷ request/limit (percent scale). Legend [cores]: raw CPU usage (cores) when that container has no matching request/limit series.

targets.expr: (label_replace((sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval])) by (container) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", resource="cpu", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) by (container)), "metric_mode", "pct", "container", ".+")) or (label_replace((sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval])) by (container) unless on(container) sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", resource="cpu", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) by (container)), "metric_mode", "cores", "container", ".+"))

(label_replace((sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval])) by (container) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", resource="cpu", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) by (container)), "metric_mode", "pct", "container", ".+")) or (label_replace((sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval])) by (container) unless on(container) sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", resource="cpu", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) by (container)), "metric_mode", "cores", "container", ".+"))

panels.title: CPU Usage / Requests & Limits by container

panels.description: Legend [pct]: working set ÷ request/limit. Legend [bytes]: raw working-set bytes when no request/limit for that container.

targets.expr: (label_replace((sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) by (container) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", resource="memory", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) by (container)), "metric_mode", "pct", "container", ".+")) or (label_replace((sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) by (container) unless on(container) sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", resource="memory", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) by (container)), "metric_mode", "bytes", "container", ".+"))

(label_replace((sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) by (container) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", resource="memory", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) by (container)), "metric_mode", "pct", "container", ".+")) or (label_replace((sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) by (container) unless on(container) sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", resource="memory", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) by (container)), "metric_mode", "bytes", "container", ".+"))

panels.title: Memory Usage / Requests & Limits by container

targets.expr: sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", container!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) by (container, id)

panels.description: Uses kubelet/cAdvisor counters container_cpu_cfs_throttled_seconds_total (or _periods_total). If Explore returns no series for those names, the kubelet on this cluster is not exposing CFS throttle metrics (common with some cgroup drivers/versions); the panel then falls back to flat zeros from kube_pod_container_info so the row is not empty.

targets.expr: (sum(rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", container!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval])) by (container) or sum(rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod",cluster_id=~"$cluster", image!="", container!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval])) by (container) or sum by (container) (sum by (container, namespace, pod) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", image!="", container!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * on(namespace, pod) group_left() max by(namespace, pod) (kube_pod_info{cluster_id=~"$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}))) or sum by (container) (kube_pod_container_info{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", cluster_id=~"$cluster", container!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} * 0)

panels.title: CPU Throttled seconds by container

targets.expr: sum by (container) (sum by (container, namespace, pod) (clamp_min(max_over_time(container_oom_events_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval]) - min_over_time(container_oom_events_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)) * on(namespace, pod) group_left() max by(namespace, pod) (kube_pod_info{cluster_id=~"$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"})) or sum by (container) (sum by (container, namespace, pod) (clamp_min(max_over_time(container_oom_events_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container!="", cluster_id=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval]) - min_over_time(container_oom_events_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container!="", cluster_id=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

(sum by (container) (sum by (namespace, pod, container) (clamp_min(max_over_time(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container!="", job=~"$job", cluster_id=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval]) - min_over_time(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container!="", job=~"$job", cluster_id=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval]), 0))) or sum by (container) (sum by (namespace, pod, container) (clamp_min(max_over_time(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container!="", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval]) - min_over_time(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container!="", job=~"$job", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)) * on(namespace, pod) group_left() max by(namespace, pod) (kube_pod_info{cluster_id=~"$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}))) or sum by (container) (kube_pod_container_info{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", cluster_id=~"$cluster", container!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} * 0)

panels.description: Waiting reasons and last_terminated_reason (now includes Unknown, Evicted, etc.).

targets.expr: (kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", reason=~"ErrImagePull|ImagePullBackOff|CrashLoopBackOff|CreateContainerConfigError|InvalidImageName", cluster_id=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} > 0) or ((kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", reason=~"ErrImagePull|ImagePullBackOff|CrashLoopBackOff|CreateContainerConfigError|InvalidImageName", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} > 0) * on(namespace, pod, uid) group_left(cluster_id) kube_pod_info{cluster_id=~"$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) or ((kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", reason=~"ErrImagePull|ImagePullBackOff|CrashLoopBackOff|CreateContainerConfigError|InvalidImageName", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} > 0) * on(namespace, pod) group_left() max by(namespace, pod) (kube_pod_info{cluster_id=~"$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"})) or ((kube_pod_container_status_waiting{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container!="", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} > 0) * on(namespace, pod, container) group_left(reason) kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", reason=~"ErrImagePull|ImagePullBackOff|CrashLoopBackOff|CreateContainerConfigError|InvalidImageName", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"}) or (kube_pod_container_status_last_terminated_reason{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", reason=~"Error|OOMKilled|ContainerCannotRun|CrashLoopBackOff|Unknown|Evicted|DeadlineExceeded|ContainerStatusUnknown", cluster_id=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} > 0) or ((kube_pod_container_status_last_terminated_reason{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", reason=~"Error|OOMKilled|ContainerCannotRun|CrashLoopBackOff|Unknown|Evicted|DeadlineExceeded|ContainerStatusUnknown", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} > 0) * on(namespace, pod, uid) group_left(cluster_id) kube_pod_info{cluster_id=~"$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"})

panels.title: Pods with Container Issues

panels.description: Count of kube_pod_info rows without PodScheduled=True. 0 means every pod in scope is scheduled (kube_pod_status_unschedulable and the unless-table query are often empty then too).

targets.expr: sum(kube_pod_info{cluster_id=~"$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} unless on(namespace, pod, uid) max by(namespace, pod, uid) ((kube_pod_status_scheduled{condition=~"true|True", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} > 0) or (kube_pod_status_scheduled{condition="true", cluster_id=~"$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} > 0))) or vector(0)

panels.title: Unscheduled pod count

panels.description: Pod rows only when count above is greater than 0; otherwise empty (not an error).

targets.expr: kube_pod_info{cluster_id=~"$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} unless on(namespace, pod, uid) max by(namespace, pod, uid) ((kube_pod_status_scheduled{condition=~"true|True", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} > 0) or (kube_pod_status_scheduled{condition="true", cluster_id=~"$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", tenant_id=~"$tenant_id"} > 0))

panels.title: Unscheduled pods (detail)

title: Kubernetes / Views / Pods
